reconcile.inboundExcluded: An inbound is excluded or the sync is stale — refresh, or unhide excluded transactions.
reconcile.manualOrDuplicate: Likely a manual or duplicate entry, or a spend that didn't sync — refresh or review those rows.

samourai.title: Samourai Wallet
samourai.toxicChange: Toxic-change spends remain reportable and need normal pricing evidence.
samourai.postmixNote: Postmix rows without exact Whirlpool metadata are shown as having at least one mix; Kassiber does not claim exact sat lineage through other participants.
samourai.stale: Samourai inventory is stale. Refresh before relying on wallet detail, reports, or source-of-funds readiness.

btcpayProvenance.title: BTCPay provenance
btcpayProvenance.description: BTCPay comments and labels enrich matching transactions during sync. Descriptor or file sync remains the balance source.
btcpayProvenance.footer: Add more routes from Add wallet → BTCPay Server → Map existing wallets, or via kassiber wallets attach-btcpay. Use Edit to clear all routes from this wallet.

recentTransactions.title: Recent transactions
recentTransactions.empty: No transactions imported for this wallet yet.

balanceHistory.title: Balance history
balanceHistory.description: Imported balance over the last {{count}} months.

reveal.title: Copy wallet export material
reveal.description: Re-enter the database passphrase to copy the stored wallet export material for {{label}}.
reveal.descriptionEncrypted: Re-enter the database passphrase to copy the stored wallet export material for {{label}}.
reveal.descriptionPlaintext: This book is not encrypted. Confirm before copying the stored wallet export material for {{label}}.
reveal.includesChange: The clipboard payload includes the stored change material on the next line.
reveal.helper: Kassiber copies the raw stored wallet export material, without field labels or table formatting.
reveal.plaintextChallenge: Type COPY LOCAL SECRET to confirm
reveal.plaintextHelper: Plaintext books do not have a database passphrase. This extra step prevents accidental clipboard exposure.
reveal.copiedBody: Copied the wallet export material for {{label}}.
reveal.errorMissingDescriptor: This wallet does not have wallet export material saved.
reveal.errorPlaintextAck: Type {{ack}} to copy this local secret.
reveal.couldNotCopy: Could not copy wallet export material.

relatedViews.title: Related views
relatedViews.description: Jump to this wallet's records across Kassiber.

edit.title: Edit connection
edit.descriptionEncrypted: Confirm this change with the local database passphrase.
edit.descriptionPlaintext: These plaintext books have no database passphrase; type the explicit local-change challenge to continue.
edit.label: Label
edit.liquidBackendHelper: Liquid wallet sources require an explicit Liquid backend.
edit.backendHelper: Choose a backend for only this wallet source.
edit.materialPlaceholder: Paste a fresh descriptor or extended public key to overwrite
edit.materialHelper: Leave empty unless you need to change the saved wallet material.
edit.scriptTypesHelper: Kassiber derives a receive and change chain for each selected type. Adding a type re-scans this wallet.
edit.errorSelectScriptType: Select at least one address type to watch.
edit.gapLimitHelper: Raise this for wallets with long unused address runs. Large values up to 5,000 can take longer, but refreshes keep running until the daemon returns.
edit.storeIdPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the current store ID
edit.sourceFilePlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the current file
edit.clearProvenanceHelper: Removes all {{count}} stored route(s). Descriptor/file sync remains the balance source. Re-add routes from Add wallet.
edit.deprecatedHelper: Keep imported history, but exclude this wallet from refresh-all and background refresh. Manual refresh still works.
edit.errorChangeNothing: Change the label or update at least one field.
edit.errorGapPositive: Gap limit must be a positive integer.
edit.errorGapMax: Gap limit must be {{max}} or lower.

delete.title: Remove connection
delete.description: This removes {{label}} and its local imported transactions. Confirm with {{challenge}} and the exact connection label.
delete.removedBody: {{label}} and its local transactions were removed.

sync.alreadyRunningBody: {{label}} is already scanning. Kassiber will update this page when the daemon finishes.
sync.stillScanning: {{label}} is still scanning. Large descriptors or slow backends can take a bit; Kassiber will update when the daemon returns.

utxoTransaction.couldNotResolve: Kassiber could not resolve this UTXO transaction.
utxoTransaction.notFoundBody: This UTXO has no matching imported Kassiber transaction yet.

noSnapshot.title: No node snapshot yet
noSnapshot.description: Lightning node sync has not produced a snapshot for this connection yet. Run a refresh to fetch channels, balances, and the routing summary.

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: Capacity, local / remote balance, and routing fee policy per channel. Click a row for full channel details.
channels.empty: No channels reported by the node.

identity.title: Node identity
identity.description: Read-only metadata from the Lightning node.

syncStatus.title: Sync status
syncStatus.description: Read-only sync state for this Lightning connection.

forwards.title: Recent forwards
forwards.description: HTLCs routed through this node, newest first. Failed and in-flight forwards stay listed so you can see liquidity friction.

sync.alreadyRunningBody: {{label}} is already scanning. Kassiber will update this page when the daemon finishes.
sync.startedBody: {{label}} is fetching channel and routing data in read-only mode.
sync.stillScanning: {{label}} is still scanning. Large channel histories can take a moment; Kassiber will update when the daemon returns.

utxos.title: UTXOs
utxos.unsupportedFallback: This wallet source does not expose a watch-only UTXO inventory.
utxos.noneBody: Refresh this source to update Kassiber's UTXO inventory.
utxos.staleWithDate: Last refreshed {{date}}. Refresh this source to update the UTXO inventory.
utxos.stale: Refresh this source to update the UTXO inventory.
utxos.transportedRows: Showing {{returned}} transported rows of {{total}} total active UTXOs.

dialog.title: Open UTXO transaction in a browser?
dialog.description: This opens {{explorer}} outside Kassiber. The explorer can see your IP address and the transaction id you request.
dialog.couldNotOpen: Could not open explorer in the default browser.

scanner.title: Scan wallet export
scanner.description: Scan an output descriptor, xpub-family export, or BBQR sequence from a wallet display.
scanner.scannedNote: Wallet material scanned. Review the pasted field after applying it.

add.title: Add connection
add.description: Choose a watch-only wallet, node, exchange, or local file source.
add.setupDescription: Enter the local details Kassiber needs for this connection.

field.filePickerFallback: The native picker could not open.

descriptor.scanHint: Paste or scan an output descriptor, xpub-family export, or BBQR sequence.
descriptor.gapLimitHelper: Default is 40 unused addresses per branch. Raise it for older or heavily used wallets, up to 5,000; long scans keep running until the daemon finishes.
descriptor.birthdayHelper: Optional. Stores the wallet's first-use date for future refresh planning.
descriptor.birthdayHelperCore: Optional. Bitcoin Core starts descriptor rescans from this date instead of genesis.
descriptor.previewHint: Derives the first 5 receive addresses without saving.
descriptor.autoDetectUnavailable: Could not auto-detect script types: {{reason}}. Pick a script type manually.
descriptor.scriptTypeHelperAuto: Leave this on Detect automatically to watch every address type with on-chain history, or pin a single one.
descriptor.bareXpubAutoDetect: {{label}} — Kassiber will detect and watch whichever address types this key has been used with.

core.detectFailed: Could not detect a local node.
core.walletRpcUnavailable: Wallet RPC is unavailable; Kassiber needs it for watch-only descriptor sync.
core.blockFiltersUnavailable: BIP158 filters are unavailable. Descriptor sync still works; enable blockfilterindex=1 only if you want filter-based tooling later.
core.prunedWarning: This node is pruned; wallet birthdays must stay inside the prune horizon.
core.initialBlockDownloadWarning: Core is still in initial block download.
core.addedBody: {{label}} is ready for Bitcoin Core sync.

addressList.helper: Paste addresses or load a .txt/.csv file, one per line. A pre-HD Bitcoin Core keypool has no xpub, so every address is scanned — there is no gap limit.
addressList.invalidHint: Skipping entries that are not mainnet addresses, e.g. {{samples}}.
addressList.privateKeysPurged_one: Removed {{count}} private key — Kassiber is watch-only, never paste private keys.
addressList.privateKeysPurged_other: Removed {{count}} private keys — Kassiber is watch-only, never paste private keys.
addressList.publicKeysPurged_one: Removed {{count}} extended/public key — use the Wallet export source for xpubs.
addressList.publicKeysPurged_other: Removed {{count}} extended/public keys — use the Wallet export source for xpubs.
addressList.errorNeedAddress: Paste or load at least one mainnet Bitcoin address.
addressList.fileReadFailed: Could not read the selected file.
addressList.stillScanning: {{label}} is scanning the address list. Large lists take longer on Esplora backends.

silentPayments.backendHelper: Kassiber cannot detect this from a normal endpoint. Choose a backend only when its operator/docs say it supports BIP352 Silent Payments scanning, or when you configured a local scanner file/path in backend settings. Ordinary Esplora, Electrum, and Bitcoin Core history sync are not enough.
silentPayments.materialHelper: Paste watch-only BIP392 sp() material such as sp(spscan1q...) or scan-private plus public spend key. Spend-private forms are rejected.
silentPayments.scanModeHelper: Local scanner file reads a JSON result produced on this machine by your scanner/indexer; Kassiber does not store or run the index. Server-assisted backend asks the selected SP-capable backend to scan, which may reveal enough to correlate this Silent Payments wallet and can miss payments if it omits scan candidates.
silentPayments.startDateHelper: Use either height or date when you know the wallet birthday.
silentPayments.fullHistoryAck: I understand full-history scanning can take a long time and reports stay incomplete until the range finishes.
silentPayments.serverAck: I understand this selected backend may learn enough to correlate this Silent Payments wallet, and incomplete or omitted scan candidates can make reports incomplete. Do not fall back to another backend.
silentPayments.stillScanning: {{label}} is scanning Silent Payments. Reports stay blocked if the selected backend returns partial history.
silentPayments.addedBody: {{label}} created as a watch-only Silent Payments source.
silentPayments.addedBodyScanning: {{label}} created as a watch-only Silent Payments source and started scanning.
silentPayments.errorStartPoint: Set a start height/date, or choose and acknowledge full-history scanning.
silentPayments.errorStartHeight: Start height must be a whole number.
silentPayments.errorServerAck: Acknowledge the server-assisted scan privacy warning.

exportFile.label: Export file path
exportFile.wasabiHelper: Choose a sanitized local bundle with Wasabi gethistory plus listcoins/listunspentcoins data. Kassiber imports it as watch-only accounting evidence.

genericLedger.templateHint: New here? Download the template, fill in your transactions, then import the file.
genericLedger.templateReadyBody: Fill in your transactions and import the file here.

preview.notRecognizedHint: Download the template, fill it in, and import that instead.
preview.submitBlocked: Resolve the preview issues before importing this ledger.

samourai.intro: Import public Samourai account material only. Empty accounts are skipped; use all four when available so Kassiber can scan the full Whirlpool history. Get these from Sparrow or another descriptor tool after it has recovered the Samourai accounts; paste only the public descriptors or account xpub-family keys.
samourai.depositHelper: Paste the Deposit account descriptor, ypub, or zpub. Bare xpub is ambiguous for Deposit; use a descriptor when unsure.
samourai.badbankHelper: Paste the Badbank / Toxic Change account descriptor or account xpub.
samourai.premixHelper: Paste the Premix account descriptor or account xpub.
samourai.postmixHelper: Paste the Postmix account descriptor or account xpub; Postmix scans may need a higher gap limit.
samourai.gapLimitHelper: Postmix keeps at least 40 unused addresses per branch. Raise this for old wallets with long unused-address runs, up to 5,000.
samourai.errorNeedMaterial: Paste at least one Samourai descriptor or xpub.
samourai.importedBodyScanning: {{label}} created {{value}} watch-only sources and started scanning.
samourai.stillScanning: {{label}} is scanning Samourai watch-only sources. Postmix discovery may take longer on old wallets.

wasabi.rpcIntro1: Start Wasabi, load the wallet, then copy JSON from the local RPC endpoint. Default RPC is {{endpoint}}; replace {{placeholder}} with the loaded Wasabi wallet name.
wasabi.rpcIntro2: If {{user}} and {{password}} are set in Wasabi, add {{auth}} to the curl command. Kassiber stores the pasted snapshot, not a live Wasabi RPC connection.
wasabi.historyHelper: Required. Accepts the raw result array or a JSON-RPC response object with result.
wasabi.additionalHelper: Optional JSON object with {{listkeys}}, {{listpayments}}, or {{walletJson}} sections. Run those Wasabi RPC methods the same way and paste the responses under matching keys.
wasabi.importingRpc: {{label}} is importing pasted Wasabi RPC output.

fileWallet.stillImporting: {{label}} is still importing from the selected file. Large exports can take a bit; Kassiber will update when the daemon finishes.

descriptorWallet.stillScanning: {{label}} is still scanning in watch-only mode. Large descriptors or slow backends can take a bit; Kassiber will update when the daemon finishes.

bullWallet.networksHelperCreate: Kassiber creates one source wallet per network so Bitcoin and Liquid swap legs can pair cleanly.
bullWallet.networksHelperMap: Kassiber keeps your descriptor or wallet source authoritative and only enriches matching rows from Bull.
bullWallet.walletMappingHelper: Link each selected Bull network to the Kassiber wallet that already tracks those transactions.
bullWallet.selectToMap: Select at least one Bull network to map.
bullWallet.stillImportingExisting: {{label}} is refreshing the mapped wallets so Bull export metadata can reconcile.
bullWallet.stillImportingSources: {{label}} is importing the selected Bull wallet networks. Large exports can take a bit.
bullWallet.mappedBody_one: {{count}} wallet will use Bull export metadata during refresh.
bullWallet.mappedBody_other: {{count}} wallets will use Bull export metadata during refresh.
bullWallet.mappedBodyRefreshed_one: {{count}} wallet will use Bull export metadata during refresh and was refreshed.
bullWallet.mappedBodyRefreshed_other: {{count}} wallets will use Bull export metadata during refresh and was refreshed.
bullWallet.sourcesBodyImported_one: {{count}} Bull wallet source configured and imported.
bullWallet.sourcesBodyImported_other: {{count}} Bull wallet sources configured and imported.
bullWallet.errorPickExport: Pick the Bull Bitcoin wallet export.
bullWallet.errorSelectNetwork: Select at least one Bull wallet network.
bullWallet.errorCreateWalletsFirst: Create or import the target wallets first.
bullWallet.errorChooseWalletEach: Choose a Kassiber wallet for each selected Bull network.

enrichment.importModeHelperFull: Imports every {{title}} row as excluded evidence and flags matched, missing, or ambiguous wallet evidence for this book.
enrichment.importModeHelper21bitcoin: Only enriches 21bitcoin L1 withdrawal rows that uniquely match existing transactions anywhere in this book.
enrichment.importModeHelperRelevant: Only enriches {{title}} rows that uniquely match existing transactions anywhere in this book.
enrichment.csvPathHelper: Use the shared {{title}} export for this book; full mode keeps rows excluded until reviewed.
enrichment.walletToEnrichHelper: Only rows matching transactions already in this wallet are applied.
enrichment.matchingFull: {{title}} is importing completed orders into this book and flagging reconciliation gaps.
enrichment.matchingBook: {{title}} is matching the export against existing transactions in this book.
enrichment.matchingWallet: {{title}} is matching the export against existing {{wallet}} transactions.
enrichment.errorNoFormat: Selected source does not define an import format.

btcpay.paymentMethodsHelperMap: BTCPay supplies these routes. Choose which supported routes enrich Kassiber settlement wallets.
btcpay.paymentMethodsHelperCreate: Choose each supported BTCPay route Kassiber should create as a wallet source.
btcpay.paymentMethodsHelperDiscoverMap: Run discovery so BTCPay can populate this mapping from the selected store.
btcpay.paymentMethodsHelperDefault: BTC-CHAIN is the default. LBTC-CHAIN works for Liquid on-chain wallets. BTC-LN needs invoice/settlement sync and is not supported here yet.
btcpay.discoverToLoad: Discover stores to load BTCPay payment methods for this settlement mapping.
btcpay.settlementMappingHelper: Link each BTCPay payment method to the Kassiber wallet that receives the funds.
btcpay.stillRefreshing: {{label}} is still refreshing from BTCPay. Large stores can take a moment; Kassiber will update when the daemon finishes.
btcpay.refreshingSettlement: {{label}} is refreshing the mapped settlement wallets. Kassiber will update when the daemon finishes.
btcpay.mappedBody_one: {{count}} settlement wallet will use BTCPay provenance during refresh.
btcpay.mappedBody_other: {{count}} settlement wallets will use BTCPay provenance during refresh.
btcpay.mappedBodyRefreshed_one: {{count}} settlement wallet will use BTCPay provenance during refresh and was refreshed.
btcpay.mappedBodyRefreshed_other: {{count}} settlement wallets will use BTCPay provenance during refresh and was refreshed.
btcpay.methodsBody: {{count}} BTCPay payment methods are configured as wallet sources.
btcpay.methodsBodyRefreshed: {{count}} BTCPay payment methods are configured as wallet sources and refreshed.
btcpay.errorSelectMethod: Select at least one BTCPay payment method.
btcpay.errorDiscoverFirst: Discover the BTCPay store to populate settlement mapping.
btcpay.errorNoSupportedMethods: No supported on-chain BTCPay payment methods were found for this store.
btcpay.errorCreateSettlementFirst: Create or import the settlement wallet first.
btcpay.errorChooseSettlementEach: Choose a settlement wallet for each selected BTCPay route.

backendSettings.line1: This connection is configured as a backend endpoint in Settings.
backendSettings.line2: Wallet setup can then select that backend by name without exposing endpoint URLs or credentials in the connection modal.

add.notWired: Dedicated setup is not wired yet.

validation.pasteWalletMaterial: Paste a wallet export, descriptor, or extended public key.
validation.gapPositive: Gap limit must be a positive integer.
validation.gapMax: Gap limit must be {{max}} or lower.

planned.title: Connection path is planned
planned.body: {{title}} is tracked in the catalog but is not wired yet.

summary.title: Import summary
summary.noChange: No stored transaction data changed. Rows may already have matching pricing, or they may have been unmatched or ambiguous.
